title: Korak 8

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Your getBookInformation function should return an array of strings with the title and author for each book.

description:
Niz naslova knjiga je dobar, ali bi bilo lepo prikazati title i author za svaku knjigu na ovaj način:

[ 
  "Your Next Five Moves: Master the Art of Business Strategy by Patrick Bet-David and Greg Dinkin",
  "Atomic Habits by James Clear",
  "Choose Your Enemies Wisely: Business Planning for the Audacious Few by Patrick Bet-David",
  ...
]

Ažurirajte korišćenje metode map() da umesto toga vrati niz stringova u ovom formatu: TITLE by AUTHOR.

Morat ćete koristiti ili template literalse ili konkatenaciju stringova sa operaterom + da biste postigli ovaj rezultat.
